configurations.name: frontend
runtimeArgs: export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH && cd /Users/evan.callia/Desktop/meal-planner/frontend && npm run dev

configurations.name: backend
runtimeArgs: cd /Users/evan.callia/Desktop/meal-planner && POSTGRES_HOST=localhost OIDC_ISSUER= SECURE_COOKIES=false FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:5173 /Users/evan.callia/Desktop/meal-planner/backend/.venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir backend --reload --port 8001

configurations.name: postgres
runtimeArgs: export DOCKER_HOST=unix:///Users/evan.callia/.colima/default/docker.sock && (/opt/homebrew/bin/docker start mealplanner-pg 2>/dev/null || /opt/homebrew/bin/docker run --name mealplanner-pg -e POSTGRES_DB=mealplanner -e POSTGRES_USER=mealplanner -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=changeme -p 5432:5432 -d postgres:16-alpine) && exec /opt/homebrew/bin/docker logs -f mealplanner-pg
